prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.text: a boy leaves home on his bicycle on a sunny morning

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.text: it starts raining and the boy shelters at a bus stop with a friend

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.text: the two friends sit together in a café eating cakes and laughing

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.text: a boy finds a lost dog wandering alone in a park

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.text: the boy notices a lost dog poster on the street

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.text: the boy returns the dog to its happy owner in a garden
